text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation as I move through these angled, sterile corridors, bathed in the hum of artificial light. The second space, full of vibrant colors and bold, graphic text, awakens my curiosity. Ideas about humanity, technology, and our evolving relationships swirl in my mind. The museum-like atmosphere prompts reflection, yet the emptiness leaves me feeling both centered and a little isolated—a fitting balance for philosophical contemplation.
